title: My Little Pony Paintings (G4)
body:
## About
**My Little Pony Paintings (G4) is a Minecraft resource pack that replaces in-game paintings with characters from My Little Pony: A New Generation**

## Changes
- Replaced 48 paintings!
- Added characters: Twilight Sparkle, Rainbow Dash, Pinkie Pie, Rarity, Applejack, Fluttershy, Spike, Starlight Glimmer, Discord, Princess Celestia, Princess Luna, Trixie Lulamoon, Apple Bloom, Sweetie Belle, Scootaloo, Cozy Glow, Derpy Hooves, Lyra Heartstrings, Bon Bon, etc.
## Why download this pack?
If you're a fan of MLP G4 and want to bring your favorite characters into the world of Minecraft, this pack is made just for you!

**Enjoy!**
